Let me explore the directory structure to understand the layout and find the GC sweeper code that was modified.","plan":"Explore the directory structure, look for backup/orig files that might show the original code, and find the relevant GC source files.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"ls /app/ocaml/

","duration":0.5},{"keystrokes":"find /app/ocaml -name 'sweep*' -o -name 'major_gc*' 2>/dev/null | head -20
","duration":0.5}]}
